title: The FVG Filter Nobody Teaches (2026)
description: Most traders lose money on fair value gaps — not because they don't see them, but because they don't filter them. R2F Trading reveals the one FVG rule that changes everything. Follow r2ftrading.com for daily ICT setups.
script: I said it every single day. 'The FVG is right there.' Three words that blew three accounts. Every FVG looked valid. Clean gap. Right zone. I'd enter — and price would rip straight through me. Every. Single. Time. Then the R2F Trading system showed us the filter. Not every FVG is tradeable. Only FVGs sitting INSIDE a confirmed order block on a higher timeframe. That's the 7% most traders never check. Now? We only trade FVGs with confluence. Funded. Consistent. Follow R2F Trading — link in bio for the free checklist at r2ftrading.com.

The FVG Filter Nobody Teaches (2026)

Most traders lose money on fair value gaps — not because they don't see them, but because they don't filter them. R2F Trading reveals the one FVG rule that changes everything. Follow r2ftrading.com for daily ICT setups.
